creator: meta@club.kyutech.ac.jp
text:
I made a new port peraperaprv. This is a pure java twitter client.

How-To-Repeat: 
# This is a shell archive.  Save it in a file, remove anything before
# this line, and then unpack it by entering "sh file".  Note, it may
# create directories; files and directories will be owned by you and
# have default permissions.
#
# This archive contains:
#
#	www/peraperaprv
#	www/peraperaprv/Makefile
#	www/peraperaprv/files
#	www/peraperaprv/files/peraperaprv.desktop.in
#	www/peraperaprv/files/peraperaprv.sh
#	www/peraperaprv/distinfo
#	www/peraperaprv/pkg-descr
#	www/peraperaprv/pkg-plist
#
echo c - www/peraperaprv
mkdir -p www/peraperaprv > /dev/null 2>&1
echo x - www/peraperaprv/Makefile
sed 's/^X//' >www/peraperaprv/Makefile << '99fd12d906f1a4a51edda1c80891f5df'
X# New ports collection makefile for:  PeraPeraPrv
X# Date created:                       2010-09-28
X# Whom:                               metalefty
X
XPORTNAME=	PeraPeraPrv
XPORTVERSION= 4.291
XCATEGORIES=	www java
XMASTER_SITES=	http://www.club.kyutech.ac.jp/~meta/distfiles/
XDISTNAME= P3_Jar_${P3_VERSION}
XDISTFILES= ${DISTNAME}.zip
X
XMAINTAINER=	meta@club.kyutech.ac.jp
XCOMMENT=	A pure java twitter client
X
XUSE_JAVA= yes
XUSE_XORG= x11
XUSE_ZIP= yes
XJAVA_VERSION=	1.6+
XNO_BUILD= yes
X
XWRKSRC=	${WRKDIR}/P3_${P3_VERSION}
XINSTALL_DIR=	${PREFIX}/${DISTNAME}
X
XP3_VERSION != ${ECHO} ${PORTVERSION} | sed -e 's/\./_/g'
XP3_NAME= peraperaprv
XP3_ICON_SRC=	${PREFIX}/P3_${P3_VERSION}/P3_Resources/Images/for_linux.png
XP3_EXEC=	${PREFIX}/bin/${P3_NAME}
XP3_ICON=	${P3_NAME}.png
X
X.include <bsd.port.pre.mk>
X
Xdo-install:
X	${CP} -r ${WRKSRC} ${PREFIX}
X	${INSTALL_SCRIPT} ${WRKDIR}/${P3_NAME}.sh ${PREFIX}/bin/${P3_NAME}
X
Xpost-extract:
X	@${SED} -e 's|@P3_ICON@|${P3_ICON}|' -e 's|@P3_EXEC@|${P3_EXEC}|' \
X		<${FILESDIR}/peraperaprv.desktop.in >${WRKDIR}/${P3_NAME}.desktop
X	@${SED} -e 's|@P3_VERSION@|${P3_VERSION}|' \
X		<${FILESDIR}/peraperaprv.sh >${WRKDIR}/${P3_NAME}.sh
X
Xpost-install:
X	${ECHO} postinstall
X	${MKDIR} ${PREFIX}/share/applications ${PREFIX}/share/pixmaps
X	${INSTALL_DATA} ${WRKDIR}/${P3_NAME}.desktop ${PREFIX}/share/applications/
X	${LN} -sf ${P3_ICON_SRC} ${PREFIX}/share/pixmaps/${P3_ICON}
X
X.include <bsd.port.post.mk>
99fd12d906f1a4a51edda1c80891f5df
echo c - www/peraperaprv/files
mkdir -p www/peraperaprv/files > /dev/null 2>&1
echo x - www/peraperaprv/files/peraperaprv.desktop.in
sed 's/^X//' >www/peraperaprv/files/peraperaprv.desktop.in << '256789666c2a416aa24804b1cee1e8ef'
X[Desktop Entry]
XEncoding=UTF-8
XName=P3:PeraPeraPrv
XComment=Pure Java Twitter Client
XTerminal=false
XCategories=Application;Network;
XExec=@P3_EXEC@
XIcon=@P3_ICON@
256789666c2a416aa24804b1cee1e8ef
echo x - www/peraperaprv/files/peraperaprv.sh
sed 's/^X//' >www/peraperaprv/files/peraperaprv.sh << '9a249ff7ff62551ebcbae84ff2fff6e2'
X#!/bin/sh
X(cd /usr/local/P3_@P3_VERSION@ && java -jar PeraPeraPrv.jar)
9a249ff7ff62551ebcbae84ff2fff6e2
echo x - www/peraperaprv/distinfo
sed 's/^X//' >www/peraperaprv/distinfo << 'a25e5a9d81aa793d395c1d537ec3fae2'
XMD5 (P3_Jar_4_291.zip) = ca4a96eba178a6e7c1a27a7cb204de53
XSHA256 (P3_Jar_4_291.zip) = 9a62c923331a68d7c1fcba3d7fabddb23d7f956a359ec51a404847bb0e65604f
XSIZE (P3_Jar_4_291.zip) = 1586921
a25e5a9d81aa793d395c1d537ec3fae2
echo x - www/peraperaprv/pkg-descr
sed 's/^X//' >www/peraperaprv/pkg-descr << '6f32b74f40d8db67fa37d87a61720f2d'
XThis is a pure java twitter client. 
X
X
XWWW: http://sites.google.com/site/peraperaprv/
X- Koichiro
Xmeta@club.kyutech.ac.jp
